title: SVM · 支持向量机
summary: SVM maximizes class margin via hinge loss + duality + kernel trick; only support vectors determine the boundary.
original_question: 请给我详细讲解一下 SVM 支持向量机算法，包括算法的数学原理、算法的可视化、训练过程、效果评估、真实数据实战等。并构建一个白色、简约、学术风格的React网站进行讲解

relations.note: Both are linear classifiers; logistic regression uses logistic loss and outputs probabilities, while SVM uses hinge loss and maximizes the margin. SVM solutions are sparse (only support vectors matter), LR uses all samples.

Both are supervised classification models. Decision trees partition feature space with axis-aligned recursive splits; SVM finds a maximum-margin hyperplane (linearly or via kernel in implicit high-dim space).
One-Class SVM extends the margin idea to anomaly detection (learn a boundary enclosing normal data). Isolation Forest also does anomaly detection but via random tree isolation.

references.title: Platt (1998) - Sequential Minimal Optimization: A Fast Algorithm for Training SVMs
